mapper.select: SELECT mt.id,mt.name,mt.description FROM md_app_tenant mat LEFT JOIN md_tenant mt ON mat.tenant_id = mt.id WHERE mat.app_id = #{appId} AND mt.status = 1 ORDER BY mt.create_time DESC
SELECT mt.id, mt.name, mt.description FROM md_app_tenant mat LEFT JOIN md_tenant mt ON mat.tenant_id = mt.id WHERE mat.app_id = #{appId} ORDER BY mt.create_time DESC
